'''Twik'gar''' was a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] thug on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] who lived on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] during the [[Old Sith Wars]]. In [[3951 BBY]], he was accompanied by two Trandoshan mercenaries to capture [[Geredi]], who borrowed him a large sum of credits. Twik'gar wanted [[Meetra Surik]] to fetch Geredi from the [[Pazaak Den]], but she never did the job.

==Behind the scenes==
If the player follows [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] story in the game, the player would tell [[Geredi]] that either a young female Twi'Lek or his friends were waiting for him outside the Den. After that, Twik'gar and his [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] thugs likely killed [[Geredi]] and disappeared.

{{Char-stub}}
